info.title: ReelMirror API
info.description: AI-powered content cloning platform. Create personas, track social accounts, sync content, and generate AI clones.

automation_mode.description: Automation level: `sync_only` = sync content only, `auto_clone` = sync + auto-generate clones, `auto_publish` = sync + generate + publish automatically

review_status.description: Review lifecycle state. `pending_review` = awaiting action; `approved` = approved but not yet published; `rejected` = rejected; `published` = published to at least one account.

trigger_source.description: How this generation was triggered. `manual` = user-initiated, `auto_clone` = automatic cloning from source, `api` = via API.

completed_at.description: When the job reached `completed` or `skipped` status

status.description: `active` = token valid; `expired` = token expired, reconnect needed; `error` = connection error
Terminal states: `published` (success) and `failed` (permanent error). Poll until terminal.

platform_post_id.description: Platform-assigned post ID after successful publish

deliveries.description: One delivery per target publishing account. Check all deliveries to determine overall publish outcome.

author_type.description: `user` = the ticket owner; `admin` = support team; `agent` = AI first responder

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tags.name: Review
tags.description: Approve, reject, or compose generated posts

tags.name: Publishing
tags.description: Manage outgoing posts and connected publishing accounts

get.description: Returns API metadata including version, available endpoints, authentication methods, and scopes. No authentication required.

endpoints.description: Map of endpoint categories to their base paths

scopes.description: Permission scopes. Defaults to all except billing:read, billing:write, feedback:read, and feedback:write.

monthly_limit_cents.description: Optional monthly spending limit in cents. Min 100 ($1), max 1000000 ($10,000). Null for unlimited.

201.description: API key created. The full key is only returned once.

monthly_limit_cents.description: Monthly spending limit in cents, or null for unlimited
Monthly spending limit in cents, or null for unlimited

monthly_spent_cents.description: Current month spending in cents (0 if no limit set)

monthly_limit_cents.description: Monthly spending limit in cents. Set to null to remove limit.

handle.description: Social account handle (e.g. `natgeo`). Leading `@` is stripped automatically.

automation_mode.description: Automation level for this source. Defaults to `sync_only`.

get.description: Get a single tracked source by ID. Requires `sources:read` scope.

patch.description: Update source settings such as automation mode. Requires `sources:write` scope.

get.description: List connected publishing accounts linked to a persona. These determine where auto-published content is delivered. Requires `publishing:read` scope.

post.description: Link a connected publishing account to a persona. The account must already be connected via OAuth (dashboard). Requires `publishing:write` scope.

connected_account_id.description: ID of a connected publishing account from `GET /v1/publishing/accounts`

409.description: Target already linked to this persona

delete.description: Unlink a publishing account from a persona. Requires `publishing:write` scope.

post.description: Sync all sources for a persona. Debits balance for estimated API requests. Returns job IDs for status polling.
Trigger AI content generation from a synced source post. Debits balance per media item + caption.
Create a new version of a generated media item.

id.description: The new generated media item ID

post.description: Apply voice conversion to a completed generated video. Requires persona to have a voice sample.
Make a generated media item public or private. Discounted public items are locked for 20 days.
Fetch a single Instagram post by URL and generate AI content from it in one step.

Regenerate a generated post. By default, soft-deletes all existing media items and re-triggers generation from scratch. When `failed_only` is true, retries only failed media items without touching completed ones or the caption.

failed_only.description: When true, retry only failed media items instead of regenerating the entire post.

202.description: Regeneration started. When `failed_only` is true, the response includes `retried_items` and `total_cost_cents`.

422.description: No failed items to retry (only returned when `failed_only` is true)

get.description: Get a generated post with all its media items. Use for polling generation status. Soft-deleted posts are excluded.

delete.description: Soft-delete a generated post and all its media items. The source post can then be re-cloned. R2 files are cleaned up asynchronously.

get.description: Get a single generated media item. Use for polling item-level status. Soft-deleted items are excluded.

delete.description: Soft-delete a single generated media item. R2 files are cleaned up asynchronously.

get.description: List synced source posts from a persona's tracked creators.

200.description: List of source posts with media items

get.description: List generated posts for a persona with their media items.

patch.description:
Configure auto-reload settings. Requires `billing:write` scope.

If `auto_reload: true` is requested and no payment method is saved, a Stripe Checkout setup session is returned (`setup_url`) so the user can add a card — `auto_reload` is **not** saved as `true` in this case.

auto_reload.description: Enable or disable automatic balance reload

reload_threshold_cents.description: Balance level (in cents) that triggers an auto-reload. Min 0, max 5000.

reload_amount_cents.description: Amount (in cents) to reload when the threshold is hit. Min 100 ($1), max 5000 ($50).

200.description: Updated balance settings, or a Stripe setup URL when no payment method is on file

setup_url.description: Stripe Checkout URL to save a payment method

400.description: Validation error (e.g., threshold/amount missing when enabling auto_reload)

post.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session to add credits to your balance. Requires `billing:write` scope.

amount_cents.description: Amount in cents to top up. Must be one of the supported values.

200.description: Stripe Checkout URL to complete payment

get.description:
Generate an OAuth URL to connect a new (or reconnect an existing) social account. Requires `publishing:write` scope.

The OAuth provider will redirect the user's browser to `/api/internal/publishing/accounts/callback` after authorization — this is not a JSON callback.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: ID of an existing connected account to reconnect. Omit for a new connection.

auth_url.description: Redirect the user to this URL to authorize the connection

400.description: Missing platform or name not set

402.description: No available slot for a new connection

get.description: Return the number of purchased, used, and available account slots. Requires `publishing:read` scope.

post.description: Set the total number of purchased account slots. Creates, updates, or cancels the Stripe subscription accordingly. Returns a `checkoutUrl` when no payment method is on file. Requires `publishing:write` scope.

slots.description: Total number of paid slots to set

returnUrl.description: Path to redirect to after Stripe Checkout (used when no card is on file)

200.description: Updated slot allocation, or a Stripe Checkout URL when no payment method is on file

checkoutUrl.description: Stripe Checkout URL when payment collection is needed

400.description: Invalid slots value or cannot reduce below active usage

get.description: List all publishing accounts (Instagram, TikTok) connected to your profile.
Check the health/status of a connected publishing account.

delete.description: Disconnect a publishing account from your profile.

get.description: List all outgoing posts for your account, including media items and delivery statuses.

post.description: Create a draft outgoing post with media items and target publishing accounts.

items.description: Media items to include in the post

200.description: Outgoing post with items and deliveries

patch.description: Update caption, platform settings, or other mutable fields on a draft post.

post.description: Immediately publish an outgoing post to all configured accounts.
Schedule an outgoing post for a future time.
Retry publishing a post that previously failed.
Cancel a scheduled outgoing post before it is published.
AI-generate a publishing caption from one or more generated media items, matching the persona's writing style.

Approve a generated post pending review. Creates an outgoing post and immediately publishes it to the persona's connected accounts.

**Requires connected accounts.** The persona must have at least one publishing account connected via `GET /v1/publishing/accounts/connect`. If no accounts are connected, the request returns `400`. Connect accounts once via the dashboard — this step requires a browser OAuth flow.

400.description: Post not in a publishable state

post.description: Reject a generated post pending review. Sets review_status to rejected.
Approve a generated post and create a draft outgoing post for manual editing in the composer, without publishing immediately.

400.description: Post not in a composable state

post.description: Reject a single generated media item within a post pending review. If all items in the post are rejected, the parent post is auto-rejected.

post_auto_rejected.description: True if all items were rejected and the parent post was auto-rejected

post.description: Upload an avatar image or voice sample. Supports multipart/form-data or JSON with a URL to fetch from. Automatically updates the persona's `avatar_url` or `voice_sample_url` field.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of your feedback tickets, ordered by most recent first.

post.description: Submit a new feedback ticket.

get.description: Fetch a single feedback ticket with all responses.

post.description: Add a reply to a feedback ticket.

Create a new account programmatically without CAPTCHA. Returns immediately with `pending_confirmation` status — a confirmation email is sent to the provided address. The account starts with $0 balance; the $5 welcome bonus is deferred until a payment method is attached via `POST /v1/billing/setup-intent`.

Rate limit: **5 signups per IP per 24 hours**. No authentication required.

email.description: The agent's email address — must be a real inbox the agent can read to confirm the account

password.description: Strong random password (min 8 chars). Store securely; a human can use 'forgot password' on the dashboard if needed

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (5 signups per IP per 24 hours)

post.summary: Create SetupIntent for headless card attachment
post.description:
Creates a Stripe SetupIntent so an agent can attach a payment method headlessly using the Stripe SDK (no browser redirect required). After the SetupIntent is confirmed, Stripe fires `setup_intent.succeeded` and the server automatically grants the **$5 welcome bonus** if none has been issued yet.

Required scope: `billing:write`.

client_secret.description: Stripe SetupIntent client secret (format: `seti_xxx_secret_xxx`). Pass to `stripe.confirmCardSetup()` or the server-side Stripe SDK to complete card attachment.
